spike.description: Attacking shot hit downward into opponent court

arm_cock_angle.description: Shoulder abduction angle at arm cocking phase

contact_point.description: Ball contact point relative to body center

toss_height.description: Ball toss height above contact point

body_lean.description: Trunk forward lean angle at contact

block.description: Defensive action at net to deflect attack

reaction_time.description: Time from opponent contact to jump initiation

hand_position.description: Hand height above net at peak jump

shoulder_width.description: Lateral spread of arms at block

landing_balance.description: Center of mass stability on landing 0-1

platform_angle.description: Forearm platform angle relative to ground

knee_bend.description: Knee flexion angle at ball contact

hip_drop.description: Hip height drop from standing to contact

recovery_position.description: Time to return to ready stance after dig
